summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the /services page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 10 sections tested and verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Services page (/services) fully tested and working. All 10 sections verified: Hero (background overlay, breadcrumb, eyebrow, H1, CTAs, 4 trust badges), Intro paragraph (contact link works), Residential (12 cards with correct hrefs), Commercial (6 cards with dark bg, correct hrefs), Maintenance (7 cards + View all link), How Every Repair Works (4 steps), FAQ (5 accordion items toggle correctly), Final CTA (title, buttons, 5 footer links), Footer (logo, phone, © 2026), Floating button (appears after 300px scroll), Mobile sticky bar (shows on <768px viewport). SEO uses custom SEOMetaTags component and useSchemas hook (not react-helmet-async). All navigation links tested and working.

hero_section.details: Background image with overlay, breadcrumb 'Home → Services', eyebrow 'SAN FRANCISCO & BAY AREA', H1 'Appliance Repair Services', sub-text, Book Online button (/book?go=1), phone button (tel:7605435733), 4 trust badges

intro_section.details: Intro paragraph found with 'contact us' link to /contact - verified navigation works

residential_section.details: 12 service cards with correct icons, titles, descriptions, hrefs and 'View Service →' links. All hrefs verified: /refrigerator-repair, /washer-repair, /dryer-repair, /dishwasher-repair, /oven-repair, /cooktop-repair, /freezer-repair, /ice-maker-repair, /stove-repair, /range-repair, /garbage-disposal-repair, /wine-cooler-repair

commercial_section.details: 6 cards with dark background. All hrefs verified: /commercial-appliance-repair, /commercial-refrigerator-repair, /commercial-washer-repair, /commercial-dryer-repair, /commercial-dishwasher-repair, /commercial-oven-repair

maintenance_section.details: 7 cards with correct hrefs. 'View all maintenance services →' link to /maintenance present. All hrefs verified: /maintenance/refrigerator, /maintenance/washer, /maintenance/dryer, /maintenance/dishwasher, /maintenance/oven-range, /maintenance/cooktop, /maintenance/wine-cooler

faq_section.details: 5 accordion items that open/close on click. Toggle functionality working correctly

final_cta_section.details: 'Not Sure Which Service You Need?' title, Book Online button, phone button, 5 footer links (Service Areas, Brands We Repair, Customer Reviews, San Francisco, Tips & Guides)

footer_section.details: FixitBay logo, phone number (760) 543-5733, © 2026 FixitBay LLC

floating_button.details: Hidden initially, appears after scrolling 300px (showFloat state works correctly)

mobile_sticky_bar.details: Shows on viewport < 768px with 3 links: CALL (tel:), BOOK ONLINE (/book?go=1), TEXT US (sms:). Floating button repositions to bottom: 72px on mobile

seo_meta_tags.details: Title tag, meta description (198 chars), canonical URL (https://fixitbay.net/services), 5 JSON-LD schemas. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component (not react-helmet-async)

navigation_links.details: Tested Refrigerator Repair card navigation and Contact link - both work correctly
